Trade.title: Trade
Trade.description: A record of a trade executed on a prediction market.

entryFeeUsd.description: Estimated Kalshi-style taker fee in USD on entry (sim).

totalOutlayUsd.description: Cash spent on entry: amount + entryFeeUsd (sim).

status.description: The current status of the trade.

pnl.description: Profit and loss for this trade.

reasoning.description: The LLM's reasoning for this trade.

triggeringNewsItems.description: News items that directly triggered this trade.

confidenceScore.description: 0-100 confidence at trade entry after source/reasoning adjustments.

tradeRating.description: 0-100 post-trade quality rating used for future prioritization.

sourcePerformanceScore.description: 0-100 source score at trade entry based on historical ratings.

reasoningPerformanceScore.description: 0-100 reasoning-cluster score at trade entry based on historical ratings.

NewsItem.title: NewsItem
NewsItem.description: A news update monitored by the bot.

content.description: The content of the news update.

BotStatus.title: BotStatus
BotStatus.description: The current state and health of the trading bot.

cashBalance.description: Unencumbered cash (not allocated to open positions). Legacy docs may use currentBalance.

totalPnL.description: Cumulative realized PnL from closed trades.

lastUpdate.description: Last time the status was updated.

portfolioHalted.description: When true, monitor and position AI are stopped until POST /api/trading/resume.

NewsSource.title: NewsSource
NewsSource.description: Persisted RSS feed. Trade-based score is computed at runtime; rss* fields track bot fetch outcomes for deprioritizing strict feeds.

rssFetchAttempts.description: Times the bot attempted to fetch this RSS URL.

rejectionRate.description: Percent: 100 * failures / attempts (0 if no attempts).

trades.description: Documents for executed and open trades.

status.description: Database containing the singleton current bot status document.

kalshi_markets.description: Chunked open-markets snapshot: docs meta, c0…cN (items[]), optional legacy open_markets_snapshot.
